description.unified: Attack frontal enemies in a circular range of self 2 times, dealing P.DMG and knocking them down for [1.5 sec->2.5 sec]. [Proxy of God] Attacks enemeis in a wider range to deal P.DMG and knock them down for [2 sec->3.5 sec].

Attacks the target 3 times, and then charges behind it to deal P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by [24%->25%] for [5 sec->10 sec]. [Proxy of God] Attacks the target 3 times, charging behind it to deal P.DMG and increase P.DMG it takes by 25% for 10 sec. [600->500] additional Crit Chance applies to this Skill.

Deals P.DMG to nearby enemies and inflicts Stun for [1 sec->3 sec]. Additionally, for [10 sec->20 sec], increases self's ATK by ???, [(added) ATK Spd by 250, All Dodge Chance by 250], and DMG of normal attacks by [100%->125%] while gaining immunity to CC. This effect is irremovable.

Increases own All DEF by ??? and [Magic Evasion->All Dodge Chance] by [240->200]. When equipped with The Holly Sword, Aea, receives the blessing of the goddess that increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [20%->30%] and reduces DMG taken from Non-Hero enemies by [20%->30%].

dark.unified: Ignores DEF when there is only 1 enemy.
Reduces the target's P.DEF by 30% for 10 sec.

light.unified: Reduces DMG taken by 20% while in [Proxy of God].

dark.unified: Increases Mana Cost by 1 and DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by [34%->100%] for the duration of Skill.

light.unified: Increases Dodge Chance by an additional 150 and recovers 5% of Max HP upon dodging. This effect only activates once every 3 sec.

dark.unified: Reduces DMG received from Heroes by 15%.

description.unified: [Judgement Blade] Reduces Cooldown by 30% and increases DMG by {0}% upon every use. This effect can be stacked up to max [5->10] times and is irremovable.
[Valiant Dash] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Cooldown by [ (removed) Critical Hit -> 10% upon a Crit Hit].
[Proxy of God] Additionally, Dodge Rate is increased by [400->250], and ATK Spd is increased by {0} for the duration of skill.
[Goddess Strike] Increases [Magic Evasion by 360->DEF Boost by 50%], and DMG dealt to [heroes->bosses] by {0}%.

dark.unified: Upon attacking, deals [60%->80%] additional P.DMG of ATK. This effect is applied as [120%->160%] to Non-Hero enemies and has 0.5 sec Cooldown.

description.unified: Each attack has a 35% chance to dealing {0}% of ATK as P.DMG. Has 0.5 sec Cooldown.

Summons the soul of The Holy Sword Aea for 10 sec, increasing own ATK and [P.DEF by 50%->All DEF by 30%]. The soul of The Holy Sword, Aea follows Kasel around, healing HP of allies within range equal to 5% of their Max HP every sec, [(added) dispeling all negative effects], and dealing P.DMG to nearby enemies every sec.

1.to: Changes ATK and DEF Boost to 50% and increases the duration by 5 sec.
1.unified: Changes ATK and DEF Boost to 50% and increases the duration by [15 sec->5 sec].

2.from: Increases DMG dealt to nearby enemies by 100%.
2.to: Increases DMG dealt to nearby enemies by 100% and dispels positive effects from hit enemies.
2.unified: Increases DMG dealt to nearby enemies by 100% and dispels positive effects from hit enemies.
